user.title: Device Setup
user.description: Configure your Tasmota IR air conditioner connection.

data_description.vendor: The IR protocol vendor (e.g., SAMSUNG_AC, ELECTRA_AC, FUJITSU_AC, MITSUBISHI_AC).
data_description.command_topic: MQTT topic for sending IR commands. Usually cmnd/'{device}'/irhvac.
data_description.state_topic: Primary MQTT topic for receiving AC state updates. Use tele/'{device}'/RESULT to capture all IR signals (including physical remote).
data_description.state_topic_2: Optional secondary MQTT state topic. Use stat/'{device}'/RESULT to also capture IR transmission confirmations. Subscribes to both topics if set.
data_description.availability_topic: MQTT topic for device online/offline status. Leave blank to auto-derive from command topic (tele/'{device}'/LWT).
data_description.mqtt_delay: Delay in seconds between MQTT commands. Use when operating multiple devices to stagger high-current peaks.

climate.title: Climate Settings
climate.description: Configure temperature ranges, modes, and fan settings. All fields have sensible defaults.

data_description.celsius_mode: Temperature unit for IR commands sent to the AC. Most AC units use Celsius internally ('on') even if your HA or remote displays Fahrenheit. Only change to 'off' if your specific AC model requires Fahrenheit IR commands.
data_description.ignore_off_temp: When the AC is turned off via remote, some devices report the lowest temperature. Enable to keep showing the last target temperature instead.
data_description.keep_mode_when_off: Keep the last HVAC mode when turning off. Required for MITSUBISHI_AC, ECOCLIM, and similar devices.
data_description.away_temp: Temperature to use when Away preset is active. Leave blank to disable the Away preset.
data_description.supported_fan_speeds: Note: auto_max/max_high are for devices where the remote shows max but Tasmota reports high, and auto which is actually max.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings & Sensors
advanced.description: Configure default modes, swing positions, toggle properties, and external sensors.

data_description.hvac_model: AC model identifier. Use -1 for auto-detection.
data_description.toggle_list: Properties that don't retain the On state. Set this if your AC has toggle-only controls (pressing the button toggles between on and off rather than setting a specific state).
data_description.special_mode: Mode to enter for special functions like automatic cleaning after operation. Leave blank to disable.
data_description.temperature_sensor: External temperature sensor entity for more accurate room temperature readings.
data_description.power_sensor: Binary sensor or sensor that indicates whether the AC unit is powered on.

data_description.celsius_mode: Temperature unit for IR commands sent to the AC. Most AC units use Celsius internally ('on') even if your HA or remote displays Fahrenheit.
